name: PT Telekomunikasi Ind. Tbk Regi
summary: PT Telekomunikasi Indonesia (Persero) Tbk, also known as Telkom Indonesia, is the largest telecommunications company in Indonesia. The company provides a full range of telecommunications services, including fixed and mobile telephony, internet, and data communication services. Telkom Indonesia is headquartered in Jakarta and serves a broad customer base across the archipelago.
